comment: Self-arming native-compiler ratchet (impl-plan T0.2). native_files lists corpus models (rel paths) the native path compiles and produces bit-identical mjModels for; native_count is the floor. The differential test fails if a listed file regresses to fallback or diverges, if any claimed-native file diverges, or if the total native count drops below the floor. Growing native_supported.h moves this ratchet up. NC1 rigid-body slice + NC1b: compiler/option/size/statistic/visual blocks, default classes, the body tree (nesting + include-merged worldbody), explicit inertials, PRIMITIVE geoms (sphere/capsule/cylinder/box/ellipsoid/plane) with closed-form mass/inertia + InertiaFromGeom + per-body BVH, all five orientation forms, full inertia eigendecomposition, all four joint types + freejoint, ComputeSparseSizes, nuser_* + user arrays; NC1b adds frames-as-containers (pose accumulation into flattened children), sites (all shapes + fromto), cameras (all intrinsic forms + targetbody), lights (incl. targetbody), mocap bodies, keyframes (with qpos0/qvel/mpos/mquat padding), and contact pair/exclude (stable-sort by body signature + id reassignment). Still fall back: mesh/hfield/material/texture assets, sites-with-material, lights-with-texture, free-joint alignment (align/alignfree), equality/tendon/actuator/sensor.
